title: Verify exact money and actuals formulas
preconditions: Canonical boundary examples including one cent, large values, matched notification plus statement evidence, statement-only rows, ambiguity, two pools, unassigned buckets, categories, later-period refunds, transfers, corrections, invalid scales, and overflow.
steps: Round-trip valid money through persistence; reject invalid values; execute reconciliation cases; compute Net Account Movement, External Spend, Budget Actual, pool totals, category totals, and pool-by-category cells over the complete policy matrix.
expected: No floating-point path or duplicate canonical effect exists; exact minor-unit equality holds; every row, column, and selected-set total reconciles; refunds, transfers, corrections, statement-only, and unassigned outcomes follow the NFR target.
